title: Zillow Group Reports Third-Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: Zillow Q3 2023 Earnings Performance. Financial Results: Zillow reported total revenue of $496 million in Q3 2023, up 3% year-over-year. Revenue by Segment: Residential Revenue: Growth in this segment demonstrated resilience. Rentals Revenue: $99 million increased 34% year over year, driven primarily by the company's multifamily revenue, which grew 42% year over year in Q3 2023. Mortgages Revenue: $24 million decreased 8% year over year, due primarily to higher interest rates that impacted demand for the mortgage marketplace. However, Q3 purchase loan origination volume grew 88% year over year from Q3 2022. Profitability Metrics: Net Loss: On a GAAP basis, net loss was $28 million in Q3. Adjusted EBITDA: Q3 Adjusted EBITDA was $107 million, $30 million above the midpoint of the company's outlook range, driven primarily by strong Rentals revenue, higher-than-expected Residential revenue, and lower-than-expected operating expenses. Cash Position: Cash and investments of $3.3 billion at the end of Q3 were flat compared to the end of Q2, after $100 million in share repurchases in Q3.
